props.name: imageSrc
props.description: The source URL for the sticker image

props.name: rotate
props.description: The rotation angle in degrees when dragging

props.name: peelBackHoverPct
props.description: Percentage of peel effect on hover (0-100)

props.name: peelBackActivePct
props.description: Percentage of peel effect when active/clicked (0-100)

props.name: peelDirection
props.description: Direction of the peel effect in degrees (0-360)

props.name: peelEasing
props.description: GSAP easing function for peel animations

props.name: peelHoverEasing
props.description: GSAP easing function for hover transitions

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the sticker in pixels

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name for additional styling
